## Security checklist

- [ ] I did not commit `.env`, database files, private keys, tokens, logs, or build artifacts.
- [ ] I did not add logs that expose SSH credentials, Gateway Token, API keys, or raw terminal input.
- [ ] User-facing behavior changes are documented.
- [ ] Gateway, credential, auth, terminal, AI, or automation changes include relevant tests.
